title: Eva 20 Trailer 3
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:24 pm Not this again. The third trailer, huh? CAM as always. But i wonder if i can't post things, bureaucracy gone mad.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:27 pm Yes please! Asuka appears like she's just gonna be bugfuck nuts in Rebuild. I'd be up for an unexpected classic character's death. And Rei a bit more expressive huh. (Scarily though that lower left hand pic of Shinji, aside from the phone by ear it looks 90% similar to a similar shot in 1.0, I hope they don't repeat any Rebuild animation, that would be a true insult.)

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:31 pm Dang you beat me to it!I was wondering if that was a new trailer playing in the background. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-536.html

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:34 pm To be or not. www.mediafire.com/?ix2zogtwncm

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:41 pm I salute you!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:52 pm Interesting, interesting stuff. Especially Gendo's hand for some reason. Also, that's way more blood than expected. I'm guessing it's from that ridiculously enormous clock Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:01 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Asuka appears like she's just gonna be bugfuck nuts in Rebuild. I'd be up for an unexpected classic character's death.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:04 am That was just me being me. I'm all for insane moments that piss off the fanbase as long as it makes for a much richer story. No validity to the thought.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:11 am I suppose if it somehow enhanced the story...no, I would still die a little inside. But, yeah, if Anno's looking for a way to fuck with the fanbase, he just needs to do that...or kill Rei permanently.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:15 am The sadness I was feeling today has totally been swept away because of this trailer. I is happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:18 am I can't download this. Any other sources/ help i could get?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:32 am CtHuLhU wrote: To be or not. www.mediafire.com/?ix2zogtwncm

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:35 am what song is playing in the background, i cant make any of the sounds out

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:37 am Some observations: (Now the quality is super crap so these are just what I figure) 1. 0:11- Looks like there's a nice blue sky. And something massive making a dark cross followed by a classic Anno Beam (those rays shots that flare into crosses). I think whatever Clock Angel has in store is going to be....cinematic! 2. 0:12- Someone's firing on Eva Unit 03/Bardiel as it approaches. Either NERV is playing a more integral role (like Ramiel in 1.0) or we'll thankfully get to see Asuka's ass handed to her. Would make more sense if they want to visualize her feeling like a failure. 3. 0:14- Wow....just wow. Nerv being blood-flooded. My guess is Sahaquiel. It just makes more sense than in NGE where they stop him from hitting the ground. And then he just explodes anyway. 4. 0:20 - Asuka does the "Put my Red Plugsuit on, you're coming with me" from Episode 8 move. Would they actually do something that goofy in the movie? 5. 0:22 - Mari's a cutie. 6. 0:23 - It's incredibly subtle but I think Rei is smiling when she turns to look up at Shinji in the next cut. Based on the background it's in the classroom and probably a continuation of the shots from previous trailers where Shinji looks over at Rei with Toji + Kensuke next to him. I'm thinking if there's any "shipping" in these films it's gonna be Shinji/Rei. 7. 0:25- Asuka is gonna murder someone with that look. Actually, this also ties into a shot of Asuka from 0:05. Even though it chronologically happens much later I think we might see Asuka and Rei's infamous "Elevator Moment" happen in this film. Well. Looking forward to people slowly chipping away at what are clearly my limited knowledge guess-timations.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Jun 13, 2009 12:45 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Some observations: (Now the quality is super crap so these are just what I figure) 4. 0:20 - Asuka does the "Put my Red Plugsuit on, you're coming with me" from Episode 8 move. Would they actually do something that goofy in the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sat Jun 13, 2009 1:19 am 8. 0:27 - Rei does her "arigatou" soliloquy after she is visited by Shinji and Toji Lots of Sahaquiel and Bardiel here, and just a bit more of clocky. But what about Zeruel? The Shogouki eye-flash at the beginning is the only thing I see that is definitely part of that scene. I doubt that the Asuka elevator shot comes from the famous elevator scene. It's far to early, it would make no sense to have that scene before Zeruel takes out their Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Jun 13, 2009 1:43 am Asuka seems to be going through puberty a bit earlier in Rebuild than the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Jun 13, 2009 2:41 am I don't know what to say...thank you! And about the trailer, I don't know what to say because.....I couldn't concentrate with all the FRIGGIN' NOISE!! Anyway, the trailer is short and moves fast. All earlier post pretty much covered all the bases in terms of shots.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Sat Jun 13, 2009 2:48 am after watching the trailer, I stand by my original assessment; the trailers might rock, but so far, it looks like Anno is going Bay on us. Maybe by 3.0 we'll have a revenge of the fallen-seque type fighting sequence. Either way, I am not impressed.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jun 13, 2009 2:51 am Tis a lot of smiles in that trailer (Shinji even smiles when he takes the headphones off on the escalator, whoever is down there makes him happy). Shit's gonna hit the fan. And I'll be all the happier for it.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 12, 2009 11:27 pm Yes please! Asuka appears like she's just gonna be bugfuck nuts in Rebuild. I'd be up for an unexpected classic character&#39
